title: CouplingConsistencyRecord
description: Records coupling proxy consistency across branch variants for a candidate (M50). Written as coupling_consistency.json by build-phase5-sidecars (P6-M3).

candidateId.description: Candidate or particle ID being checked.

relativeSpread.description: Relative spread of the coupling proxy across branch variants: (max - min) / mean.

consistent.description: Whether the coupling is consistent (spread below policy threshold).

provenance.description: Provenance of the backend that produced this record.
